description_long: This stereo sound system features a robust, rectangular wooden frame with a central black panel housing eight prominent circular speakers arranged in two columns. On top, a sophisticated DJ controller with a digital display and two turntables is positioned, suggesting advanced audio mixing capabilities. The side sections contain large, vertically ribbed speaker grilles, likely for enhanced bass output, and the wood finish adds a stylish, modern touch. The rear of the unit is mostly flat with a combination of black and wood panels, and no visible ports or connectors. The top surface is flat and can support small objects, while the overall build appears solid and substantial. The design is both functional and visually striking, suitable for urban entertainment spaces or public events.
description: A large, wood-framed stereo sound system with multiple front-facing speakers, a DJ controller, and two turntables on top. The design is modern, with black and wood finishes and prominent speaker grilles.
description_view_0: Front view showing eight circular speakers, two side speaker grilles, and the DJ controller with turntables on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the unit, the side speaker grille, and the overhanging DJ controller and turntables.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a mostly flat black and wood panel surface with no visible controls or ports.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the other side speaker grille and the DJ controller's profile.
attribute_brand_logo: A white logo with the text 'ILLUSIONAR' is visible on the front of the DJ controller, centered above the display.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: The speaker grilles on each side feature a vertical ribbed pattern, while the central speakers have concentric circular rings with a smooth finish.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel consists of a central digital display flanked by two turntables, with numerous buttons, knobs, and sliders arranged around the display and on the turntables.
